notes: Fajr Jamaat is fifteen minutes after Sehri ends. Dhuhr/Jumu'ah Jamat shown in column. Maghrib Jama'at: ten minutes before Dhuhr column times where noted. Taraweeh salah is an emphasised sunnah. I'tikaaf in last 10 days of Ramadhan is also a sunnah. Women programme every Sunday after Dhuhr salah. Receiver cost £30. Fadaail-e-Ramadhan and Profit from Ramadhan recommended reading. Subah Sadiq calculated using 18 degrees method.
address: The Grange, Hamstead Hill, Birmingham B20 1BH

notes: Fajar Salah will be 15 minutes after the end of Sehri time. Dars-e-Quran after Asar Salah at the Weekend during month of Ramadhaan. Listen to Live broadcast of Adhaan and Talks from Masjid on 447-6250.
Clocks go forward 1 hour on 29th March 2026. Jum'a Speech (Khutba) starts at 1:00pm.

address: 1-8 The Broadway, Perry Barr, Birmingham, B20 3EA
notes: During the Month of Ramadhan Fajr Jamaat will be 15 mins after Sehri Ends. Zohr 1:00PM & Jumuah @ 1:15PM. As a precaution please close your fast 5 minutes before Sehri ends.

Zuhr Jamaat 12:40pm. Jumu'ah at 12:30pm & 1:40pm. Eid Salaah 7:30am & 9:00am. Last ten nights Qiyam-ul-Layl at midnight. Fidya/Kaffarah £1.50 per fast. Pay Fitrana by 25th Ramadan. 100% of all Zakat funds will be distributed to the needy. Bank: Lloyds Bank, S/C: 30-93-09, A/C: 01195888. Taraweeh recitation of Surah/Ayah listed per night. Pay Your Zakat.

Qur'an completion in Taraweeh will be taking place on 29th Ramadhan. Zuhr Jamat 1:00 (vertical text indicates fixed Zuhr Jama'at at 1:00). Jumu'ah Jamat 1:00. Maghrib Jamat will commence six minutes after Iftar time. For Brothers: Daily after Taraweeh Salaah. For Sisters: Saturday's 1:45pm Urdu Lecture, Sunday's 1:45pm English Lecture.

Daily Zuhr Jama'at: 1:00pm. Fajr Jama'at is 15 minutes after Fajr start. Maghrib Jama'at is 10 minutes after Azan. English Sermons will start 30 minutes before Salah. Ramadan Daily Programme: Weekdays Mon-Fri: After Fajr - One Hadith 5-minute session Translation & Practical Lessons; After Zuhr - Ta'lim (in Urdu); After Asar - Darsul Qur'an Surah Yusuf; After Tarawih - Short Reminders. Saturday: After Zuhr - Darsul Qur'an Surah Al Fatihah; After Asar - English Talk. Sunday: After Zuhr - Darsul Hadith Riyadus Salihin; After Asar - Darsul Qur'an Surah Yusuf. Note: The programmes after Fajr and Tarawih will continue as normal on the weekend.
Jama'at times are subject to changes. Changes will be displayed on display screens. Maghrib Jama'at times are shown in the Maghrib Jama'at column. Listen live by visiting emasjid.live/masjidevali.
